title: You Can Call Me Al
why_this_song: You Can Call Me Al by Paul Simon (1986) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "call" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "call" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "betty" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "betty" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: A man walks down the street
And whoa, my nights are so long
Maybe it's his first time around

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Why am I soft in the middle?
He is surrounded by the sound, sound

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "You Can Call Me Al" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "You Can Call Me Al" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "You Can Call Me Al" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "You Can Call Me Al" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "You Can Call Me Al" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "You Can Call Me Al"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "You Can Call Me Al" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "You Can Call Me Al", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?
